untranslatable_reason: This signal describes a custom adaptive Bollinger Band calculation methodology with exponential smoothing (M_t = a×C_t + (1-a)×M_{t-1}) and volatility-adjusted band corrections. The allowed indicator set includes standard bb_upper, bb_middle, bb_lower, and bb_bandwidth, but does NOT support: (1) custom smoothing constants 'a' as parameters, (2) recursive/iterative calculations across bars, (3) intermediate smoothed components (M_t, U_t, m_t), or (4) the corrected center line formula D_t = ((2-a)×M_t - U_t)/(1-a). The signal requires parametrization of smoothing_constant_a and approximated_period, both marked [THRESHOLD_NEEDED], making it incomplete. The custom adaptive band construction cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators.
translation_notes: Signal requires custom indicator implementation. Recommend: (1) Define smoothing constant 'a' value (e.g., 0.1 for ~20-day EMA approximation), (2) Implement adaptive band calculation as custom preprocessing, (3) Once computed, reference via bb_upper/bb_lower or create named custom indicators, (4) Add entry/exit logic comparing price to adaptive bands. Direction marked NEUTRAL as no directional bias specified. Target regime HIGH_VOL aligns with signal purpose of correcting volatile period bulges.
